typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	varEndYear as integer (),
	varOTables as string (),
	varStartYear as integer (),
	var_batches as string (),
	var_batch_nbr as integer (),
	var_log_path as string (),
	var_fzg_fnln_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	var_fzl_fnln_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	var_fzl_fn_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	var_fzl_ln_row_score as decimal(10,0) (),
	Var_log_path as string ()
}

source(output(
		{} as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT   p1.row_id   ,msp.row_id                      AS master_row_id   ,hosp_patient_nbr   ,p1.phn   ,p1.phn_clean   ,p1.name_first_middle   ,1                               AS first_name_score   ,p1.name_first   ,p1.name_last   ,1                               AS last_name_score   ,p1.name_first_middle_clean   ,p1.name_last_clean   ,p1.birth_date   ,p1.gender   ,p1.aka_name   ,1                               AS row_score   ,p1.dupe_count   ,julian_month   ,p1.patient_nbr   ,p1.street_addr1   ,p1.street_addr2   ,p1.city   ,p1.province   ,p1.postal_code   ,p1.phone_number   ,p1.data_source   ,p1.phn_clean                    AS master_phn   ,msp.name_last_clean             AS master_name_last   ,msp.name_first_middle_clean     AS master_name_first_middle   ,msp.birth_date                  AS master_birth_date   ,msp.gender                      AS master_gender   ,msp.data_source                 AS master_data_source   ,msp.street_addr1                AS master_street_addr1   ,msp.street_addr2                AS master_street_addr2   ,msp.city                        AS master_city   ,msp.province                    AS master_province   ,msp.postal_code                 AS master_postal_code   ,msp.phone_number                AS master_phone_number   ,NULL                            AS [mark]   ,\'A\'                             AS match_code   ,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATETIME2(0)) AS dss_create_dt_tm   ,30003                             AS stage_id FROM [ecms].[tmp_patient_stg2] p1   INNER JOIN (SELECT 	phn_clean 	,name_last_clean 	,name_first_middle_clean 	,birth_date 	,gender 	,data_source 	,row_id 	,street_addr1 	,street_addr2 	,city 	,province 	,postal_code 	,phone_number 	,ROW_NUMBER() 	   OVER ( 	     PARTITION BY phn_clean 	     ORDER BY julian_month DESC, patient_nbr DESC) rank_nbr               FROM 	[ecms].[tmp_patient_stg2]               WHERE  [mark]=1) msp           ON p1.phn_clean=msp.phn_clean WHERE  [mark]=1    AND msp.rank_nbr=1    /*SELECT   row_id   ,hosp_patient_nbr   ,phn   ,phn_clean   ,1                 AS row_score   ,name_first_middle   ,1                 AS first_name_score   ,name_last   ,1                 AS last_name_score   ,birth_date   ,gender   ,aka_name   ,street_addr1   ,street_addr2   ,city   ,province   ,postal_code   ,phone_number   ,data_source   ,row_id            AS master_row_id   ,phn               AS master_phn   ,name_first_middle AS master_name_first_middle   ,name_last         AS master_name_last   ,birth_date        AS master_birth_date   ,gender            AS master_gender   ,street_addr1      AS master_street_addr1   ,street_addr2      AS master_street_addr2   ,city              AS master_city   ,province          AS master_province   ,postal_code       AS master_postal_code   ,phone_number      AS master_phone_number   ,data_source       AS master_data_source   ,\'A\'               AS match_code   ,1                 AS dupe_count   ,julian_month   ,patient_nbr   ,CAST(GETDATE() as datetime2(0)) as dss_create_dt_tm ,300 as stage_id FROM [ecms].[tmp_patient_stg2] WHERE  [mark]=1;*/',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> src
src sink(input(
		last_name_score as integer,
		master_data_source as string,
		match_code as string,
		gender as string,
		city as string,
		dupe_count as short,
		birth_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		julian_month as short,
		street_addr1 as string,
		street_addr2 as string,
		name_last as string,
		dss_create_dt_tm as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		aka_name as string,
		province as string,
		master_postal_code as string,
		master_birth_date as date 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		master_name_last as string,
		phn_clean as string,
		master_phone_number as string,
		patient_nbr as integer,
		name_first as string,
		master_phn as string,
		master_name_first_middle as string,
		master_province as string,
		first_name_score as integer,
		master_gender as string,
		stage_id as integer,
		master_city as string,
		row_score as integer,
		data_source as string,
		master_row_id as string,
		hosp_patient_nbr as string,
		phn as string,
		master_street_addr2 as string,
		phone_number as string,
		master_street_addr1 as string,
		row_id as string,
		postal_code as string,
		name_first_middle as string,
		mark as short
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		last_name_score,
		master_data_source,
		match_code,
		gender,
		city,
		dupe_count,
		birth_date,
		julian_month,
		street_addr1,
		street_addr2,
		name_last,
		dss_create_dt_tm,
		aka_name,
		province,
		master_postal_code,
		master_birth_date,
		master_name_last,
		phn_clean,
		master_phone_number,
		patient_nbr,
		name_first,
		master_phn,
		master_name_first_middle,
		master_province,
		first_name_score,
		master_gender,
		stage_id,
		master_city,
		row_score,
		data_source,
		master_row_id,
		hosp_patient_nbr,
		phn,
		master_street_addr2,
		phone_number,
		master_street_addr1,
		row_id,
		postal_code,
		name_first_middle,
		mark)) ~> dest
